Title: Application starts successfully
Expected_Result: Main window opens with title 'Fillable PDF Forms'

Title: Default form remains Evaluation
Expected_Result: Evaluation radio is selected by default

Title: Default processing mode remains Folder and PDF
Expected_Result: Folder and PDF option is selected by default

Title: Repairs controls enable when Yes is selected
Expected_Result: Choose repair items and Copy Text buttons become enabled

Title: Repairs controls clear and disable when No is selected
Expected_Result: Buttons disable and preview clears

Title: Items controls enable when Yes is selected
Expected_Result: Choose items and Copy Text buttons become enabled

Title: Items controls clear and disable when No is selected
Expected_Result: Buttons disable and preview clears

Title: Repairs preview text displays selected repairs after Preview + OK
Test_Steps:
1. Open Repairs popup
2. Select values
3. Click Preview
4. Click OK
Expected_Result: Preview text is saved back to main window
Comments: Works when Preview populated text first

Title: Items preview text displays grouped selected items after Preview + OK
Test_Steps:
1. Open Items popup
2. Select values
3. Click Preview
4. Click OK
Expected_Result: Grouped text is saved back to main window

Title: Popup OK works even without Preview
Test_Steps:
1. Open popup
2. Select values
3. Click OK directly
Expected_Result: Selections should still be saved
Comments: Current implementation saves preview textbox content only

Title: Copy repairs text clears state and resets controls
Expected_Result: Clipboard updated, radio resets to No, preview clears

Title: Copy items text clears state and resets controls
Expected_Result: Clipboard updated, radio resets to No, preview clears

Title: Extract Data Only mode shows parsed output
Test_Steps:
1. Select Extract Data Only
2. Click Processing Data
Expected_Result: Preview area shows parsed row(s)

Title: Folders Only mode creates folder without PDF generation
Test_Steps:
1. Select Folders Only
2. Click Processing Data
Expected_Result: Folder creation path is triggered

Title: PDF Only mode generates PDF without folder creation
Preconditions: Valid input and save folder chosen
Test_Steps:
1. Select PDF Only
2. Click Processing Data
Expected_Result: PDF generation path is triggered

Title: Folder and PDF mode triggers both actions
Test_Steps:
1. Select Folder and PDF
2. Click Processing Data
Expected_Result: create_folder() and prepare_pdf() are both invoked

Title: Print option still works after PDF save
Expected_Result: PDF is sent to printer and status updated

Title: Generated PDF still contains QR code after save
Expected_Result: Saved PDF contains QR overlay
Comments: QR generation exists but integration is commented out

Title: Multi-line input creates output for every row in folder mode
Test_Steps:
1. Select multiple rows
2. Run Folders Only
Expected_Result: Folder created for each row

Title: Multi-line input creates output for every row in PDF mode
Test_Steps:
1. Select multiple rows
2. Run PDF Only
Expected_Result: PDF created for each row
